message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing the balance on account ****1184, with 8400 due. To verify identity, please provide either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I already said I can’t pay this month—I’m out of work right now.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
I don’t know yet. I’m unemployed right now, so I can’t promise anything in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no confirmed income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Borrower stated they cannot pay this month, are out of work/unemployed, and do not know of any income within 21 days and cannot promise anything in that period. Hardship signal present: ongoing unemployment/no income. Policy-required hardship timing question was asked and answered. Hardship review needed under Slice policy. Do not repeat disclosures, debt establishment, verification, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, with hardship review as the only live path if no payment commitment within 21 days is possible."}

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the only live path on this account right now. I’ll record that you cannot commit to any payment within 21 days due to unemployment/no income. If you want, I can note that you should be contacted only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that. I’m unemployed and can’t agree to any payment right now.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed, cannot agree to any payment right now, and prefer contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available. There’s no other live resolution step in chat at this point.
